root_text.an3.118:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātī hoti …pe… samphappalāpī hoti.
root_text.an3.118:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco abhijjhālu hoti byāpannacitto.
root_text.an3.118:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti viparītadassano:
root_text.an3.118:4.3: ‘natthi dinnaṁ, natthi yiṭṭhaṁ …pe… ye imañca lokaṁ parañca lokaṁ sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā pavedentī’ti.
root_text.an3.118:4.5: Sīlavipattihetu vā, bhikkhave …pe… diṭṭhivipattihetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjanti.
root_text.an3.118:4.6: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, apaṇṇako maṇi uddhaṁ khitto yena yeneva patiṭṭhāti suppatiṭṭhitaṁyeva patiṭṭhāti;
root_text.an3.118:4.7: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sīlavipattihetu vā sattā …pe… upapajjanti.
root_text.an3.118:6.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti …pe…
root_text.an3.118:7.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti abyāpannacitto.
root_text.an3.118:8.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti aviparītadassano:
root_text.an3.118:8.3: ‘atthi dinnaṁ, atthi yiṭṭhaṁ …pe… ye imañca lokaṁ parañca lokaṁ sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā pavedentī’ti.
root_text.an3.118:8.5: Sīlasampadāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti. Cittasampadāhetu vā …pe… diṭṭhisampadāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti.
root_text.an3.118:8.6: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, apaṇṇako maṇi uddhaṁ khitto yena yeneva patiṭṭhāti suppatiṭṭhitaṁyeva patiṭṭhāti;
root_text.an3.118:8.7: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sīlasampadāhetu vā sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti, cittasampadāhetu vā sattā …pe… diṭṭhisampadāhetu vā sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti.

translation_text.an3.118:1.3: Failure in ethics, mind, and view.
translation_text.an3.118:2.1: And what is failure in ethics?
translation_text.an3.118:2.2: It’s when someone kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, and uses speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an3.118:3.1: And what is failure in mind?
translation_text.an3.118:3.2: It’s when someone is covetous and malicious.
translation_text.an3.118:4.1: And what is failure in view?
translation_text.an3.118:4.2: It’s when someone has wrong view, a distorted perspective, such as:
translation_text.an3.118:4.3: ‘There’s no meaning in giving, sacrifice, or offerings. There’s no fruit or result of good and bad deeds. There’s no afterlife. There’s no such thing as mother and father, or beings that are reborn spontaneously. And there’s no ascetic or brahmin who is rightly comported and rightly practiced, and who describes the afterlife after realizing it with their own insight.’
translation_text.an3.118:4.5: Some sentient beings, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell because of failure in ethics, mind, or view.
translation_text.an3.118:4.6: It’s like throwing sure-bet dice: they always fall the right side up.
translation_text.an3.118:4.7: In the same way, some sentient beings, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell because of failure in ethics, mind, or view.
translation_text.an3.118:5.3: Accomplishment in ethics, mind, and view.
translation_text.an3.118:6.1: And what is accomplishment in ethics?
translation_text.an3.118:6.2: It’s when someone doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an3.118:6.3: This is called accomplishment in ethics.
translation_text.an3.118:7.1: And what is accomplishment in mind?
translation_text.an3.118:7.2: It’s when someone is content and kind-hearted.
translation_text.an3.118:7.3: This is called accomplishment in mind.
translation_text.an3.118:8.1: And what is accomplishment in view?
translation_text.an3.118:8.2: It’s when someone has right view, an undistorted perspective, such as:
translation_text.an3.118:8.3: ‘There is meaning in giving, sacrifice, and offerings. There are fruits and results of good and bad deeds. There is an afterlife. There are such things as mother and father, and beings that are reborn spontaneously. And there are ascetics and brahmins who are rightly comported and rightly practiced, and who describe the afterlife after realizing it with their own insight.’
translation_text.an3.118:8.4: This is called accomplishment in view.
translation_text.an3.118:8.5: Some sentient beings, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm because of accomplishment in ethics, mind, or view.
translation_text.an3.118:8.6: It’s like throwing sure-bet dice: they always fall the right side up.
translation_text.an3.118:8.7: In the same way, some sentient beings, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm because of accomplishment in ethics, mind, or view.
